qa_pairs.question: How can a user add the Ceph client repository to a Debian-based Linux distribution (such as Debian, Ubuntu, or Mint)?
qa_pairs.answer: To add the Ceph client repository on a Debian-family distribution, first determine your distro's codename using the command `lsb_release -sc`. Then, execute `sudo apt-add-repository 'deb https://download.ceph.com/debian-tentacle/ {codename} main'`.

qa_pairs.question: What action should be taken if the `apt-add-repository` command fails while attempting to add the Ceph client repository on a Debian-family system?
qa_pairs.answer: If the `sudo apt-add-repository 'deb https://download.ceph.com/debian-tentacle/ {codename} main'` command produces an error, you should revert it by running `sudo add-apt-repository -r 'deb https://download.ceph.com/debian-tentacle/ {codename} main'` before proceeding to the next step.
